query: SELECT u.id, u.email, r.id as role_id FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.userId LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.roleId = r.id WHERE u.email = 'admin@demo.aiq.com' LIMIT 5;
